headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace faces regulatory review of precision manufacturing practices

sentiment.reasoning: A regulatory review suggests potential negative outcomes like fines, operational changes, or reputational damage, creating short-term investor concern and potential long-term operational adjustments.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
